<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

<!-- Describe the feature you'd like -->

## Affected Modules
<!-- Which existing modules will be affected or will a new module be needed? -->
<!-- e.g. auth, user, session, device, notification, new module: payment -->

<!-- What must be true for this feature to be considered complete? -->

<!-- Describe the endpoint(s) this feature would expose -->
```
METHOD /api/v1/path
Request body: { ... }
Response: { ... }
```

## Database Changes (if applicable)
<!-- Will new models, fields, or indexes be needed in Prisma schema? -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered -->
